contract_ownership.rule: Deck Master runtime contracts are authored in docs/contracts first; capability and skill copies are generated or synchronized after the runtime contract is accepted.

frozen_decisions.cli_policy: Keep existing CLI names as compatibility anchors. Add target command names or aliases only when the implementing task introduces behavior.
frozen_decisions.state_policy: Use awaiting_agent_execution as the new production generation wait state. Accept dispatched as a legacy input status during migration.
frozen_decisions.contract_policy: No duplicate canonical contract sources. Runtime truth starts in docs/contracts.
